productDisplayName: Fabindia Women Purple Printed Silk Kurta
description: CompositionPurple and white printed kurta, made of silk, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, three quarter sleeves, blue piping along the neckline and cuffs and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDry clean onlyfabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craft persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta sets the tone for an all-new ethnic trend. Wear this with denims, cotton pants or leggings. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33”
